---
id: cast-study-guide-vote
title: "Cast or change a vote on a study guide"
description: "Upserts the authenticated user's vote on the guide. Same-direction"
sidebar_label: "Cast or change a vote on a study guide"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/askatlas-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Cast or change a vote on a study guide"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/study-guides/{study_guide_id}/votes"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Upserts the authenticated user's vote on the guide. Same-direction
re-submits are no-ops; opposite-direction submits flip the vote.
Returns the post-upsert `vote_score` so the UI can update without
a refetch. Soft-deleted guides return 404. Creators may vote on
their own guides (no self-vote restriction).


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
